Thank you for the invitation today.
Thanks for coming,
It's amazing; I didn't know you owned a house in Trump Tower.
No, I bought it when it became cheaper. Just got lucky.
I've also caused you a lot of trouble, so this is like a consolation party for you.

Despite being a direct invitation from the director, there aren't that many people. Perhaps it's because many are busy, or maybe
film industry personnel have gathered. It doesn’t seem they can truly enjoy it since the filming has been canceled.
Meryl's erratic behavior was about to bring silence, but now the liveliness is returning.
With a face as if nothing had happened, he raises his glass to his mouth and talks to the customer next to him.
He seemed affected by the fact that the shooting had been cancelled, but now it looked like he’s moved on.
He does seem a bit down, but it’s not as bad as I expected. I probably shouldn’t worry.
He seems to be strongly shocked by Meryl's actions. It’s no wonder he can’t remain calm after witnessing his mistress’s rampage.
He doesn’t seem to want to chase after Meryl. Did he think it wouldn’t be wise to expose himself to further disgrace?
Lately, I haven't been able to shake off the fatigue in my body. I guess I'm getting old.
Getting old? You're still quite young.
Hey now, you can’t call an old guy with white hair young, can you? I don’t mind the compliment though.
Not seeing Patricia around is
Yeah, she’s on a trip. We’ve been having minor conflicts lately, and as a dad, dealing with my daughter is tough. I’m not sure how to handle it.
I can’t understand that unless I become a parent myself.
Really, sometimes I wish I didn’t have a daughter.
I really do think that sometimes.
I have my own struggles too.
Oh dear, I shouldn’t be complaining.
No, not at all.
I never thought Meryl would do something like that.
Are you okay? Your complexion doesn’t look good.
No, I’m fine. More than that, I feel bad for everyone. It’s a blessing in disguise that no one got hurt.
Meryl
What have you done?
seems to appear unchanged, but somehow she looks tired.
Is that so? I can’t really tell.
No.
I think he must be worried about Ginny too. He was, like, very pure, you know.
He's not as bad as you might think.
He seems to be looking for Ginny in his own way.
Is that so?
I pray that no more acquaintances end up dead.
I hope Ginny is still alive.
Yeah.
After all, her body hasn't been found yet.
He probably still has hope for that.
Even if the police get worked up searching, it's no use.
I don't think they'll find Ginny though.
Guy is lively, isn't he? That energy hurts my eyes.
Hurt your eyes, you say?
The aura of energy radiating from him is blinding.
If only I were young again.
I don't intend to resent Guy. He was a victim too.
Hey Jake, why was he targeted by Meryl? I initially thought Meryl was coming after me.
Excuse me, do you have any personal experience with that?
N-no.
That's not it, but she's the type to jump to conclusions on her own.
Anyway, I'm glad there were no injuries.
She seems to have changed her vibe a bit.
She's pretty high from being so happy that Guy is back.
Oh, I see.
But I didn't think she'd be the type to act that way. People really are not what they seem.
Isn't it great that Guy came back?
She's a brave woman, stepping in between Guy and Meryl to protect him.
Isn't that how it goes for everyone when it comes to someone they love?
I wonder, I might unexpectedly be too scared to move.
She is a brave woman.
Lately, I've been consulting my daughter a lot.
I troubled her even with the movie issue.
Haha.
Having a daughter of that age is tough, isn't it?
Yeah, really.
If I hadn't been able to consult her, I would have been more flustered.
She has helped me a lot.
I'm really grateful.
She was very scared. She apparently thought Meryl was going to attack her.
Is it because they were like cats and dogs? Or is there something else you can think of?
I don't know. She was just terrified. Poor thing must have been quite scared with such a woman in front of her.
I never want to make her feel like this again.
Cindy ended up in a pitiful situation.
Yes. I never thought she would be killed like that.
Her leg must have been severed, right? When I heard that, I was seriously horrified. That girl, who had a bright future ahead,
Now that Cindy is gone, Gloria won't be able to work anymore. She loved Cindy deeply.
I'm also worried about Gloria's health. She looked quite exhausted.
I really hope they catch the perpetrator soon.
It's a tragic incident; who could do such a thing to such a good girl?
Meryl definitely said Ariana, right? Wasn't Cindy's real name Ariana?
Indeed, that's right.
So, Meryl and Ariana are mother and daughter, huh?!
Why would you say that?
I see. Meryl's request was to find her daughter. You don't have to agree, client confidentiality is paramount, right?
If Cindy was Meryl's daughter...
Everything makes sense.
I'm stumped, really.
I thought they were aiming for me, but they attacked Guy instead. Thankfully, no one got hurt.
I'm really glad no one was injured. If someone had gotten hurt, it would have been a big deal.
Yeah, that's true.
But I wonder if Meryl walked down 5th Avenue in that outfit. She lacks awareness as an actress.
It's sad, but.
Meryl might be beyond saving.
Do you think Cindy's case was the work of the serial murderer's doing?
I honestly can't say at this point.
So, does that mean there are other possibilities?
I think there's a chance it could be an act that mimics the serial murder case.
I see. But who is the culprit, and why are they doing this?
I hope they get caught soon.
Is there really a chance that Meryl could be the murderer?
Why would you say that!?
No, it's because she could freak out like earlier and do who knows what.
But even so, that seems like quite a leap.
I see.
In that case, there's no problem.
I don't want to bear any more worries; I just pray that the culprit isn't one of our own.
This isn't mine.
But this key looks like just an accessory. I wonder if it's actually used as a key?
Well, who knows? The design is overly ornate, but it seems like it could function as a key.
However, I've never seen anything like it before.
I wonder whose it is.
